modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error: Hop count exceeded when sending email in Outlook

full_description_text: 
El usuario está tratando de enviar un correo electrónico. Recibe un error que dice "Hop count exceeded - possible mail loop". Esto sugiere que hay un problema con el envío del mensaje.
short_description: Error: Hop count exceeded when sending email in Outlook
description: El usuario está tratando de enviar un correo electrónico. Recibe un error que dice "Hop count exceeded - possible mail loop". Esto sugiere que hay un problema con el envío del mensaje.
